title: Gateway & Frontend Experience
description: NGINX traffic, gateway errors, browser errors and Core Web Vitals.

targets.rawSql: SELECT sum(value) AS connections FROM (SELECT Attributes, argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS value FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND MetricName = 'nginx.connections_current' GROUP BY Attributes)
SELECT argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS requests FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND MetricName = 'nginx.requests'
SELECT sum(Value) AS errors FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ServiceName = 'profile' AND MetricName = 'frontend.errors'
SELECT count() AS errors FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = 'account-gateway' AND match(Body, 'status=5[0-9][0-9]')

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, Attributes['state'] AS state, avg(Value) AS connections FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND MetricName = 'nginx.connections_current' GROUP BY time, state ORDER BY time
SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, max(Value)-min(Value) AS requests FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND MetricName = 'nginx.requests' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, Attributes['frontend.name'] AS vital, sum(Sum)/sum(Count) AS value FROM otel.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND MetricName = 'frontend.web_vital' AND Attributes['frontend.name'] IN ('LCP','FCP','INP','TTFB') AND Count > 0 GROUP BY time, vital ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, sum(Sum)/sum(Count) AS cls FROM otel.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND MetricName = 'frontend.web_vital' AND Attributes['frontend.name'] = 'CLS' AND Count > 0 GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT Timestamp, Body, TraceId FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = 'profile' AND position(Body, 'frontend_telemetry') > 0 ORDER BY Timestamp DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT Timestamp, Body, TraceId FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = 'account-gateway' AND (position(Body, ' ERROR ') > 0 OR position(Body, ' WARN ') > 0 OR match(Body, 'status=5[0-9][0-9]')) ORDER BY Timestamp DESC LIMIT 100
